---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# UKVegTB

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

A lightweight taxonomic backbone based on the UKSI, designed for use in vegetation science.

## Installation

You can install the development version of UKVegTB from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("NERC-CEH/UKVegTB")
```
